response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience with a strong match against the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and current AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators — directly aligned with the role's AI agent development requirement. He demonstrates polyglot proficiency, craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), and architecture experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, Kotlin/Java for backend services, and Vitest mentions, but his breadth and adaptability strongly suggest he can ramp up quickly.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React core stack match
Active AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks
Strong craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in resume
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is from older roles (robotics/mobile orchestration)
Cloud/containerization breadth unclear — AWS CDK mentioned but limited GCP/Azure/Kubernetes depth shown

key_factors.factor: Core stack match (TS/Node/React) + AI agent/MCP experience
Seniority and breadth far exceeds 6+ year minimum
Missing explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, and Vitest experience
